iocs.capabilities: Keylogging, screen capture, clipboard data collection

iocs.comment: BeardShell C2 infrastructure, legit service abused by the malware
Covenant C2 infrastructure, legit service abused by the malware
BeardShell only executes in taskhost.exe or taskhostw.exe

queries.comment: SlimAgent and BeardShell execution, dll injection
SlimAgent 2024 file detection by specific function names. content:"FN_log_window_text"
Modified Covenant file detection by specific function names. content:"GruntUUID" and content:"filenClient"

ttps.comment: Acquire Infrastructure: Web Services - BeardShell relies on Icedrive cloud storage. Covenant relies on Filen cloud storage.
Develop Capabilities: Malware - BeardShell and SlimAgent are custom malware.
Command and Scripting Interpreter: PowerShell - BeardShell executes PowerShell commands.
Shared Modules - BeardShell and SlimAgent are full-fledged DLL files.
Event Triggered Execution: Component Object Model Hijacking - BeardShell and SlimAgent are made persistent by hijacking COM objects.
Obfuscated Files or Information - BeardShell Icedrive token decryption is obfuscated.
Deobfuscate/Decode Files or Information - BeardShell decrypts its strings.
Execution Guardrails - BeardShell only executes in taskhost.exe or taskhostw.exe. SlimAgent only executes in explorer.exe.
Hide Artifacts - SlimAgent logs are written into a hidden file.
System Information Discovery - BeardShell sends a fingerprint of the compromised machine.
Data from Local System - BeardShell, Covenant, and SlimAgent collect data from a compromised machine.
Input Capture: Keylogging - SlimAgent performs keylogging.
Screen Capture - SlimAgent captures screenshots of the compromised machine.
Clipboard Data - SlimAgent collects clipboard data.
Data Obfuscation - BeardShell exfiltrates data in fake images.
Application Layer Protocol: Web Protocols - BeardShell and Covenant use HTTPS for C&C.
Web Service - BeardShell gets commands from Icedrive. Covenant gets commands from Filen.
Encrypted Channel: Asymmetric Cryptography - BeardShell communications with Icedrive are encrypted using HTTPS. Covenant communications with its controller uses RSA-encrypted session keys.
Exfiltration Over Web Service - BeardShell exfiltrates data to Icedrive. Covenant exfiltrates data to Filen.

iocs.comment: C2 server for additional payload retrieval
Commercial VPN segment used for egress to Israel targets
Israeli VPN node used for egress
Zero-trust mesh network deployed for internal lateral movement
Disk encryption utility downloaded for destructive encryption
Copies registry hives from VSS (SYSTEM hive)

infection_chain.comment: Compromised VPN credentials -> RDP lateral -> NetBird deployment -> Recon (ADRecon, LSASS dump) -> Could wait for months -> Disable Defender -> GPO wiper deployment -> Multi-stage wiping

queries.value: Process | where ProcessImageName in~('rundll32.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'powershell.exe') | where ProcessCommandLine contains 'comsvcs.dll' or ProcessCommandLine contains 'MiniDump' or ProcessCommandLine contains 'ADRecon'
queries.comment: Pre-wiping recon: LSASS dump, registry copy, ADRecon execution

queries.value: DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteIP in ('107.189.19.52', '169.150.227.0/24', '146.185.219.235') | where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
queries.comment: Suspicious C2/VPN connections from Iranian actors

ttps.comment: Exploit Public-Facing Application - Compromised VPN accounts for initial access.
External Remote Services - RDP for hands-on lateral movement.
Lateral Tool Transfer - NetBird deployment via browser download.
OS Credential Dumping: LSASS Memory - comsvcs.dll MiniDump.
Account Discovery: Domain Accounts - ADRecon PowerShell.
Data Destruction - Handala Wiper (MBR/file overwrite).
Disk Wipe: Disk Structure Wipe - Custom MBR wiping.
Inhibit System Recovery - Multiple parallel wiping methods.
Data Encrypted for Impact - VeraCrypt disk encryption.
Command and Scripting Interpreter: PowerShell - AI-assisted wiping script.
Execution Guardrails - Domain Admin creds validation pre-impact.
Valid Accounts - Compromised DA credentials for GPO deployment.
